comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Socotra episode. Books, history, frankincense, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE SOCOTRA COLLECTION*

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*

  ◦ Socotra and Arabian Peninsula tours → https://shorturl.at/GUEmp
  ◦ Browse Arabian Peninsula experiences → https://shorturl.at/9inkb

*📖 PLAN YOUR SOCOTRA TRIP*
  ◦ Bradt Socotra Travel Guide, 2nd edition → https://amzn.to/4e8cpOx
  ◦ Lonely Planet Oman, UAE & Arabian Peninsula → https://amzn.to/4wUssa5

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO SOCOTRA*
  ◦ Arabs: A 3,000-Year History by Tim Mackintosh-Smith → https://amzn.to/4uMxkg7
  ◦ The Periplus Maris Erythraei (Casson, Princeton) → https://amzn.to/49LyWyr

*🌿 BRING SOCOTRA HOME*
  ◦ The Song of the Dodo by David Quammen → https://amzn.to/3Rvhisp
  ◦ Frankincense and Myrrh Resin (4 oz) → https://amzn.to/4u5OdRD

comments.author: @user-be7er9px2r
comments.text: Your artistry and mastery of your topics are miraculous. I just wished you didn't choose music that almost drowns out your voice. It's so hard to filter I have to watch these fantastic artworks in 10-15 segments. But I truly enjoy your work and and am very grateful that I have the opportunity to see them

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Thank you for the kind words, and for sticking with it in segments — that's exactly the kind of feedback we need. We'll take a closer look at the music balance so it doesn't compete with the narration.

replies.text: Thank you for watching. More journeys on the way. 🌿

comments.author: @solosasia
comments.text: not the best video on Socotra, he talks too much about the Dragons Blood trees and never shows any pictures of the unique Adeniums which grow there.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: The Adeniums are genuinely one of the most visually striking things on the island — a real missed opportunity in the cut. Thank you for flagging it.

comments.author: @damonhill4909
comments.text: Fascinating documentary! I used to have an adenium obesum plant. It had beautiful flowers as shown. In the early drone scenes I saw tree trunks that are much wider at the bottom than the Dragon Blood trees. I believe those are baobab trees. ❤❤😊
